description:
calibre is the one stop solution to all your e-book needs.

calibre is an e-book manager. It can view, convert, edit and catalog e-books in all of the major e-book formats. It can also talk to e-book reader devices. It can go out to the internet and fetch metadata for your books. It can download newspapers and convert them into e-books for convenient reading. It is cross platform, running on Linux, Windows and macOS.
New features
- Content server: A new "modern" interface with a sidebar to ease navigation
- Content server: When used with HTTPS allow installation as a PWA (Progressive Web App)
- Edit book: Saved searches: When filtering the list of saved searches match by keywords
  Closes tickets: 2156386
- CSS parsing: Add support for CSS Level 4 selectors
  Closes tickets: 2156213
- Cover grid: When using an image larger than the viewport as a texture scale it to fit the viewport
  Closes tickets: 2154669
- Annotations browser: Allow restricting displayed annotations by custom annotation styles as well
  Closes tickets: 2154593
- Edit book: Compress images: Add option to convert PNG images to JPEG or WEBP
Bug fixes
- E-book viewer: Fix IME on Windows not working when typing in notes for highlights
  Closes tickets: 2049604
- Conversion: Heuristics: Improve performance in some pathological cases
- SNB Input: Fix error on some input files
- Windows: fix rare crash when too many notifications are displayed at once
- Fix duplicating of books not duplicating value from enumerated columns when the column has a default value defined
  Closes tickets: 2103999
- Fix a regression in 9.8 that caused errors from AI plugin providers to be silently swallowed and not displayed to user
- Fix CSV export invalid when exporting comments field
  Closes tickets: 2155175
- Disallow Python templates when reading book metadata (CVE-2026-53511)
Improved news sources
- The Week
- Economist Espresso
- Horizons
